name: desktop-split-layout
description: Desktop split layout for chat UI: left gallery panel (flex-1, product grid, empty state) + right phone-like chat column (440px fixed width). Products hidden from chat with md:hidden, shown in gallery instead. Mobile: full-width, products inline.

content: IKEA-minimal design: #0058A3 blue accent, #EBEBEB user bubbles, #E0E0E0 borders, white assistant bubbles with border, Inter font via Google Fonts, rounded (4px) corners max, no glassmorphism/backdrop-blur.
